import os, pandas as pd
base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited/'

    label = p.split('non-inhibited/')[-1]
    print(label)
    print('  shape:', df.shape, 'cols:', list(df.columns)[:5])
    print()
